top_signals.title: Euro Zone Probably Saw First Inflation Slowdown Since Iran War Began
top_signals.summary: The euro zone’s first signs of respite in inflation since the outbreak of the Iran war are forecast for data next week that will reflect the impact of subsiding energy costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: OpenAI hasn't held pre-IPO investor meetings or set timeline yet, sources say
top_signals.summary: OpenAI said it confidentially filed its prospectus with the SEC earlier this month, but noted it "may be a while" before it goes public.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Jeremy Grantham says this is the most expensive market in 'American history'
top_signals.summary: Jeremy Grantham says soaring valuations around AI makes the U.S. stock market historically expensive.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: OpenAI and Anthropic face new AI reality as users shift from 'tokenmaxxing' to efficiency
top_signals.summary: Companies are tightening their AI budgets to focus on getting a return on their investment, and that could dampen growth rates at OpenAI and Anthropic.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Currie: The oil market is in surplus, but that tells us nothing about tomorrow - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Currie: The oil market is in surplus, but that tells us nothing about tomorrow  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Equinor Scuttles Japanese Offshore Wind Plan
top_signals.summary: Equinor has decided to end its offshore wind business activities in Japan, where it has been since 2018 but has failed to win any leases in successive auctions, and close its Tokyo office by the end of 2026.Orsted, the world's largest offshore wind developer, exited Japan in 2024 and Equinor has pre
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
